title: AI Adoption, Trust and Governance
summary: How Joz connects governance, usability, trust, and workflow fit to improve enterprise AI adoption.
claims: AI adoption is an organisational and workflow problem, not only a model-quality problem.
Trust requires source grounding, permissions, observability, evaluation, accountability, and appropriate human control.
Joz's background in human-centred systems and enterprise AI helps bridge governance and usability.
proof_points: Applied AI skills explicitly include observability, governance, ACL-aware retrieval, verification, and feedback loops.
Established HCD–AI and Lean ML UX practices in enterprise environments.
Worked in financial services, public systems, and large-scale media where trust and operational reliability matter.
